title: Jacobs Selected for Metropolitan Transit Authority of Harris County Transit Program
text: Strategic consulting and advisory services to drive ongoing program framework Project will improve mobility for Houston area, one of the fastest growing metros in the U.S. DALLAS , Oct. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jacobs (NYSE: J) has been selected as Owner's Advisor for the Metropolitan Transit Authority of Harris County's (METRO) Joint Development and Transit Oriented Development program in Houston, Texas. METRO selected Jacobs as part of a county-wide initiative to leverage its regional transit properties with private investment to increase ridership, enhance the transit experience and improve connectivity for Houston's 2.3 million residents.
